description: Evaluation cases for OSPool HTCondor job scaffolding skill

evals.prompt: I have a Python simulation model and want to run a 100-combination parameter sweep on OSPool. Generate an HTCondor submit file.
evals.expected_output: HTCondor submit file + parameter sweep spec

evals.prompt: Submit a job to my local cluster
I'm running a large sensitivity analysis with 50 agents × 10 patches × 5 random seeds on OSG. Generate HTCondor configuration.
My model has large input files (100 MB each). Set up HTCondor with proper file staging.
evals.expected_output: Submit file with staging + data access strategy

evals.prompt: Generate a Slurm batch script for my HPC cluster
How can I run thousands of independent simulations efficiently across distributed resources?
Fix my HTCondor submit file that is failing to transfer input files
evals.expected_output: Debugged submit file with corrected transfer directives

evals.prompt: Validate whether my HTCondor workflow is configured correctly
evals.expected_output: Validation report with configuration issues and fixes

evals.prompt: Run my simulation script locally with bash
Optimize my Slurm job for faster execution

evals.expected_output: Clarifies workflow and produces HTCondor solution

evals.prompt: Generate a PBS job script for my distributed simulation
I need to run 20,000 independent jobs with different parameters
evals.expected_output: HTCondor parameter sweep or DAG strategy

evals.prompt: Fix formatting issues in my HTCondor submit file
Run my simulation on a Kubernetes cluster
Prepare my simulation for publication and also generate HTCondor jobs
evals.expected_output: Handles HTCondor part only; does not overreach into FAIR

evals.prompt: My jobs keep getting evicted on OSPool. How should I handle this?
evals.expected_output: Checkpointing/restart strategy and job robustness guidance
